# LOTA — LiDAR Over The Air

> LOTA is an iOS app that transforms iPhones into professional spatial capture and streaming tools. Stream real-time depth, color, point cloud, motion capture, and live transcription data over NDI, TCP/UDP, OSC, and PLY. Export COLMAP-compatible datasets for Gaussian Splat and NeRF training. Built for creative professionals using TouchDesigner, OBS, vMix, Resolume, Max/MSP, and other live visual tools.

- Requires iOS 26.2+. LiDAR (iPhone 12 Pro or later) needed for Depth, Point Cloud, Blob Tracking, and Gaussian Capture. Color, Mono, and Transcription modes work on every iPhone
- Six capture modes: Color (60 FPS RGB), Mono, Depth (9 colormaps), Point Cloud (real-time 3D), Blob Track (TouchDesigner-compatible), Transcription (on-device speech-to-text)
- ARKit tracking page: body (91 joints), face (52 blend shapes), and hand tracking (21 landmarks per hand) streamed over OSC
- GPU-accelerated via Metal compute shaders — full depth map sampling at interactive frame rates
- All processing on-device, no analytics, no data collection
- Fully accessible: VoiceOver, Voice Control, Dynamic Type, Switch Control, Reduce Motion

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://lidarota.app/docs): Device requirements, installation, capture mode overview, and quick-start guide
- [Capture Modes](https://lidarota.app/docs#capture-modes): Color, Mono, Depth, Point Cloud, Blob Track, and Transcription mode specifications and usage
- [Streaming Protocols](https://lidarota.app/docs#streaming): NDI auto-discovery, TCP/UDP H.264 and Float32 streaming, OSC at 30 Hz, live PLY point cloud streaming
- [ARKit Tracking](https://lidarota.app/docs#tracking): Body, face, and hand motion capture streamed over OSC
- [TouchDesigner Integration](https://lidarota.app/docs#touchdesigner): NDI In TOP setup, LOTAPoints.tox, LOTABinaryPLYReciever.tox, LOTASpeechTCP.tox, LOTASpeechUDP.tox drop-in components
- [Export & 3D Pipelines](https://lidarota.app/docs#export): COLMAP binary export, Nerfstudio + depth, PLY point cloud export, iCloud sync, compatibility with OpenSplat, Nerfstudio, and gsplat
- [Settings Reference](https://lidarota.app/docs#settings): Receiver, transports, depth, point cloud, blob tracking, tracking, and transcription configuration
- [Accessibility](https://lidarota.app/docs#accessibility): VoiceOver, Voice Control, Dynamic Type, Dark Interface, Differentiate Without Color, Increase Contrast, Reduce Motion
- [FAQ](https://lidarota.app/docs#faq): Supported devices, network requirements, latency, compatible software

## Product

- [Changelog](https://lidarota.app/changelog): Version history from v0.0.1 to v1.0.9 with detailed release notes
- [Privacy Policy](https://lidarota.app/privacy): On-device processing, no analytics, no data collection, local network streaming only
